leads.risk: Deep ASSA ABLOY/Vingcard relationship means they may resist a competing brand or use us only as a price lever; must prove reliability, spare-parts supply and PMS compatibility.

leads.angle: Only relevant as a complementary channel — pitch electronic/smart door locks and electric strikes that pair with their Hikvision access-control installs, filling a product gap they do not stock.
leads.risk: Committed exclusive Hikvision distributor; likely brand-loyal and may view a competing Chinese lock/access vendor as conflicting with their principal, limiting willingness to add our line.
